title: polypodium auritum
intro: Polypodium auritum, also known as the Goldie fern or resurrection fern, is a species of epiphytic fern that is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Polypodium auritum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Polypodium auritum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin issues.
